users.bio: Social Media Marketing Expert & Cricut Design Specialist

courses.title: Social Media Marketing for Crafters
courses.description: A 4‑week, hands‑on course focused on branding, promotion, and client engagement for the event décor industry using Cricut design and social platforms.

modules.title: Brand & Visual Identity
modules.description: Define your brand and build visual consistency.

modules.title: Content Strategy & Captions
modules.description: Plan content and write compelling copy.

modules.title: Platform Growth & Engagement
modules.description: Grow on Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest.

modules.title: Portfolio & Showcase
modules.description: Build a portfolio that converts followers into customers.

lessons.title: Brand Voice & Ideal Customer
lessons.content: Define who you serve and how you speak to them.

lessons.title: Cricut Design Identity
lessons.content: Create logo, pattern, and product mockups.

lessons.title: Captions & Descriptions
lessons.content: Write compelling product descriptions and CTAs.

lessons.title: TikTok Trends
lessons.content: Leverage trends for visibility and growth.

lessons.title: Pinterest for Crafters
lessons.content: Use pins to drive traffic and sales.

lessons.title: Client DMs & Responses
lessons.content: Handle inquiries and convert to bookings.

lessons.title: Portfolio Curation
lessons.content: Select and present your best work.

projects.title: Brand Identity Kit
projects.description: Create 3 Cricut designs that represent your brand (logo, pattern, product mockup).
projects.instructions: Design in Cricut Design Space, create physical prototypes, photograph your work, and upload images.

projects.title: 30‑Day Content Calendar
projects.description: Plan a month of posts with captions and hashtags.
projects.instructions: Create a 30‑day schedule for Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest.

projects.title: Platform Content Sprint
projects.description: Post 5 pieces of content and share analytics.
projects.instructions: Submit screenshots of posts and performance metrics.

projects.title: Final Portfolio Showcase
projects.description: Curate your portfolio and present your best work.
projects.instructions: Select 6–10 posts and create a portfolio presentation.
